description: This microfibre drying mat is perfect for creating extra space around your sink area. The drying mat has a cushion surface that protects work surfaces and is gentle on dishes. It is made of highly absorbent microfibre that helps to dry the dishes quickly. Measures approximately 41 x 46cm. Comes in presentation packaging.
